title: bidens alba var. radiata
intro: Bidens alba var. radiata, commonly known as Radiate Beggarticks or Radiate Beggar Lice, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and easing respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Bidens alba var. radiata can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as a tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a safe and effective manner.
